---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address. What use case would it enable?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. What would the user experience be like?

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.

## Use Cases
Provide 1-3 real-world examples of how this feature would be useful:

1. **Use Case 1**: 
2. **Use Case 2**: 
3. **Use Case 3**: 

## Impact
- **User Type**: (All users / Power users / Developers / etc.)
- **Difficulty**: (Easy / Medium / Complex)
- **Priority**: (Low / Medium / High)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here. Links to similar features in other plugins are helpful!

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with the plugin's goals
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users
- [ ] This is not already on the [Roadmap](https://github.com/frostmute/make-it-rain/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3Aenhancement)
